evidence.snippet: Pyrotechnic Flight Termination System for launchers

items.notes: FTS for Aircraft product referenced but page skipped; Pyrotechnic FTS for launchers also listed. Both confirm flight termination hardware capability.

products_categories.notes: Pyroalliance's primary defense product relevance to UXV is the Flight Termination System for Aircraft. Other products (explosive bolts, actuators, pin pullers) serve missile/space programs primarily.

value.address: 139, Route de Verneuil – BP 2052, 78132 Les Mureaux cedex

evidence.snippet:
**Les Mureaux – Headquarters**
139, Route de Verneuil – BP 2052
78132 Les Mureaux cedex – France

Pyroalliance is the leading supplier of high value-added pyrotechnic and mechanical solutions and equipment for defense needs (ballistic and tactical missiles, torpedoes, naval and aeronautical platforms). Our products are developed and qualified to deliver the multiple functions essential to the success of a weapon system's mission: ignite, transmit, propel, separate, release, deploy, cut, safeguard.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Pyroalliance supplies pyrotechnic components (FTS for aircraft, explosive bolts, actuators, pin pullers) to defense aeronautical platforms including potential UAV applications, but no explicit UAV/drone mention on site. Low confidence due to indirect UXV connection.

products.notes: More products exist (Bendable Linear Shaped Charge, Deflagrating Transfer Lines, Gas Generator, Retractor, Separation Nut, Pyrotechnic FTS for Launchers) from skipped or unrendered pages.

ndaa.notes: French company (subsidiary of ArianeGroup); no NDAA mention anywhere in corpus.

blue_uas.notes: No Blue UAS / Blue sUAS mention anywhere in corpus.

evidence.snippet: We continually adapt and update our production, test resources and methods to meet our customers’ changing requirements. In particular, we are increasing production rates and competitiveness while also ensuring compliance with all applicable quality standards.
Pyroalliance designs and manufactures a series of explosive bolts for defense applications.

readiness.notes: Qualified products with specific part numbers and technical specifications; company describes increasing production rates. Serial manufacturing of energetic/pyrotechnic devices for space and defense programs.

unresolved_questions: No explicit UAV/drone mention on site; UXV relevance inferred from FTS for Aircraft product

fetch_requests.reason: FTS for Aircraft product page would confirm FTS hardware details and application domains including UAV/drone, strengthening flight_termination category and component_supplier role

tagline: French-based pyrotechnic component supplier producing flight termination systems, explosive bolts, initiators, and actuators for defense and aerospace platforms. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; minimal public evidence of US unmanned-systems integration or qualification.
